allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\uploads"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\uploads" -Force }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\uploads\\.gitkeep"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\uploads\\.gitkeep" -Force }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\backend\\uploads"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\backend\\uploads" -Force }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\data"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\data" -Force }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\data\\.gitkeep"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\data\\.gitkeep" -Force })
Bash(echo "=== 测试 Agent 模式 - 查成绩 ===")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid = $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID: $pid"; Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed" } else { Write-Output "No process on 3000" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $procId = $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID: $procId"; Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed" } else { Write-Output "No process on 3000" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $procId = $conn.OwningProcess; if \($procId -and $procId -ne 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $procId" } else { Write-Output "No process" } } else { Write-Output "Port free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $procId = $conn.OwningProcess; if \($procId -and $procId -ne 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $procId" } })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Output "Port 3000 in use by PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn -and $conn.OwningProcess -ne 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Port free" })

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; echo "Done. PIDs killed: $\($pids -join ','\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=[k for k in d.get\('_data',{}\).keys\(\) if 'school' in k or 'weu' in k]; print\('School-related keys:', keys\); [print\(f'{k}: {str\(d[\\"_data\\"][k]\)[:100]}'\) for k in keys]")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing; "Frontend running, status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend error: $_" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if d['status']=='ok' else 'FAIL'\)")
PowerShell(cd "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "node_modules"\)\) { npm install } else { Write-Host "前端依赖已存在" })
PowerShell(cd "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\backend"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "node_modules"\)\) { npm install } else { Write-Host "后端依赖已存在" })
PowerShell(cd "D:\\Vue3_武理小精灵\\backend"; if \(-not \(Test-Path ".env"\)\) { Write-Host "WARNING: backend/.env 不存在，需要配置环境变量" } else { Write-Host ".env 文件存在" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/health" -Method Get; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/stream" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"message":"你好","history":[],"conversationId":"test"}'; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/stream" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"message":"hi","history":[],"conversationId":"test"}' -Headers @{"Origin"="http://localhost:5173"} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Headers:"; $r.Headers | Format-List } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
